en: The revelation of Jesus Christ, which God gave him to show to his servants the things that must soon take place. He made it known by sending his angel to his servant John,
zh: 耶穌基督的啟示，就是 神賜給他，叫他把快要發生的事指示他的眾僕人。他就差派天使顯示給他的僕人約翰。

en: who bore witness to the word of God and to the testimony of Jesus Christ, even to all that he saw.
zh: 約翰把 神的道，和耶穌基督的見證，凡是自己所看見的，都見證出來了。

en: Blessed is the one who reads aloud the words of this prophecy, and blessed are those who hear, and who keep what is written in it, for the time is near.
zh: 讀這書上預言的人，和那些聽見這預言並且遵守書中記載的人，都是有福的！因為時候近了。

en: John to the seven churches that are in Asia: Grace to you and peace from him who is and who was and who is to come, and from the seven spirits who are before his throne,
zh: 約翰寫信給在亞西亞的七個教會。願恩惠平安，從那位今在、昔在、以後要來的 神，從他寶座前的七靈，

en: and from Jesus Christ the faithful witness, the firstborn of the dead, and the ruler of kings on earth. To him who loves us and has freed us from our sins by his blood
zh: 又從那信實的見證人、死人中首先復生的、地上眾君王的統治者耶穌基督臨到你們。 他愛我們，用自己的血把我們從我們的罪中釋放出來，

en: and made us a kingdom, priests to his God and Father, to him be glory and dominion forever and ever. Amen.
zh: 又使我們成為國度，作他父 神的祭司。願榮耀權能都歸給他，直到永永遠遠。阿們。

en: Behold, he is coming with the clouds, and every eye will see him, even those who pierced him, and all tribes of the earth will wail on account of him. Even so. Amen.
zh: 看哪，他駕著雲降臨， 每一個人都要看見他， 連那些刺過他的人也要看見他， 地上的萬族都要因他哀號。 這是必定的，阿們。

en: "I am the Alpha and the Omega," says the Lord God, "who is and who was and who is to come, the Almighty."
zh: 主 神說：“我是阿拉法，我是俄梅格；我是今在、昔在、以後要來，全能的 神。”

en: I, John, your brother and partner in the tribulation and the kingdom and the patient endurance that are in Jesus, was on the island called Patmos on account of the word of God and the testimony of Jesus.
zh: 我約翰，就是你們的弟兄，在耶穌裡跟你們一同分享患難、國度和忍耐的，為了 神的道和耶穌的見證，曾經在那名叫拔摩的海島上。

en: I was in the Spirit on the Lord's day, and I heard behind me a loud voice like a trumpet
zh: 有一個主日，我在靈裡，聽見在我後邊有一個大聲音，好像號筒的響聲，

en: saying, "Write what you see in a book and send it to the seven churches, to Ephesus and to Smyrna and to Pergamum and to Thyatira and to Sardis and to Philadelphia and to Laodicea."
zh: 說：“你所看見的，要寫在書上，也要寄給以弗所、士每拿、別迦摩、推雅推拉、撒狄、非拉鐵非、老底嘉七個教會。”

en: Then I turned to see the voice that was speaking to me, and on turning I saw seven golden lampstands,
zh: 我轉過身來要看看那跟我說話的聲音是誰發的；一轉過來，就看見七個金燈臺。

en: and in the midst of the lampstands one like a son of man, clothed with a long robe and with a golden sash around his chest.
zh: 燈臺中間有一位好像人子的，身上穿著直垂到腳的長衣，胸間束著金帶。

en: The hairs of his head were white like wool, as white as snow. His eyes were like a flame of fire,
zh: 他的頭和頭髮像白羊毛、像雪一樣潔白，他的眼睛好像火燄，

en: his feet were like burnished bronze, refined in a furnace, and his voice was like the roar of many waters.
zh: 他的兩腳好像在爐中精煉過的發光的銅，他的聲音好像眾水的聲音。

en: In his right hand he held seven stars, from his mouth came a sharp two-edged sword, and his face was like the sun shining in full strength.
zh: 他的右手拿著七星，有一把兩刃的利劍從他口中吐出來；他的臉發光好像正午的烈日。

en: When I saw him, I fell at his feet as though dead. But he laid his right hand on me, saying, "Fear not, I am the first and the last,
zh: 我看見了他，就仆倒在他腳前，像死了一樣。他用右手按著我，說：“不要怕！我是首先的，我是末後的，

en: and the living one. I died, and behold I am alive forevermore, and I have the keys of Death and Hades.
zh: 又是永活的；我曾經死過，看哪，現在又活著，直活到永永遠遠，並且拿著死亡和陰間的鑰匙。

en: Write therefore the things that you have seen, those that are and those that are to take place after this.
zh: 所以，你要把所看見的，現在的，和今後將要發生的事都寫下來。

en: As for the mystery of the seven stars that you saw in my right hand, and the seven golden lampstands, the seven stars are the angels of the seven churches, and the seven lampstands are the seven churches.
zh: 你所看見在我右手中的七星和七個金燈臺的奧祕就是這樣：七星是七個教會的使者，七燈臺是七個教會。”
